name: Cognigy
description: Enterprise Voice AI, Chat AI and Agent Copilot platform for CX automation across digital and voice channels.

seo.title: Cognigy — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Cognigy: Enterprise Voice AI, Chat AI and Agent Copilot platform for CX automation across digital and voice channels.

when_to_use: Voice AI agent handling tier-1 support calls autonomously
Agent copilot surfacing knowledge base answers in real-time
Omnichannel bot routing chat, email, and voice from one UI
Enterprise contact center automation with CX analytics
Post-call wrap-up automation reducing AHT for agents

pros: Strong voice plus chat enterprise coverage
cons: Enterprise pricing with long sales cycles
Steep learning curve for advanced flows
review.verdict: A serious enterprise voice and chat AI platform, overkill unless you run a real contact center.
review.best_for: Large contact centers needing multilingual voice plus chat AI and agent copilot.
review.not_for: Small teams or SMBs that just need a helpdesk chatbot.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
